title: Persist extracted memories during compaction (parity with CC sessionMemoryCompact.ts)
description:
## Goal
Implement sessionMemoryCompact.ts behavior: extract session memory during compaction and use it as the summary, instead of always calling the summarization LLM.

## CC behaviors (sessionMemoryCompact.ts ~630 lines)
- shouldUseSessionMemoryCompaction(): gated by feature flags tengu_session_memory + tengu_sm_compact, env overrides ENABLE/DISABLE_CLAUDE_CODE_SM_COMPACT
- SessionMemoryCompactConfig: minTokens=10_000, minTextBlockMessages=5, maxTokens=40_000; remote-configurable via GrowthBook tengu_sm_compact_config
- calculateMessagesToKeepIndex(): starts after lastSummarizedMessageId, expands backward to meet min thresholds, stops at maxTokens cap, floors at previous compact boundary
- adjustIndexToPreserveAPIInvariants(): prevents splitting tool_use/tool_result pairs and thinking blocks sharing message.id
- trySessionMemoryCompaction(): waits for in-progress extraction, checks autoCompactThreshold before accepting result, handles resumed-session case (no lastSummarizedMessageId)
- createCompactionResultFromSessionMemory(): builds CompactionResult with truncated session memory as summary, no LLM call needed
- autoCompactIfNeeded() tries sessionMemoryCompact first, falls back to full compactConversation
- setLastSummarizedMessageId() reset after successful SM compact

## OC counterpart
None. OC's memory.rs has SQLite-based archival/core memory but no sessionMemoryCompact integration with the compaction pipeline.

## Parent
#523. Phase 1 spec tracked in #534.
